title: University Syndicate cannot sue the Chancellor as both are parts of the same legal body: Kerala High Court
description: The Kerala High Court recently held that the Calicut University's Syndicate is not entitled to challenge an appellate order passed by the University's Chancellor in disciplinary proceedings [MB Fasal v State of Kerala & ors and connected case].Justice Ziyad Rahman AA observed that under the Calicut University Act, the Chancellor occupies a superior position in the hierarchy of the University and acted as the appellate authority over decisions taken by the Syndicate.The Court added that one c
